title: crataegus punctata var. pausiaca
intro: Crataegus punctata var. pausiaca, also known as the Himalayan hawthorn or Indian hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn tree native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus punctata var. pausiaca include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as a natural anti-cholesterol agent. Crataegus punctata var. pausiaca can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used to support heart health and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease.
